summary_points: Stress that biggest wait-time gains are in urgent care intake
Call out imaging as modest improvement, not systemwide transformation
Note specialty referrals remain the main bottleneck
Tie gains to front-desk staffing changes and revised triage workflow

attributes.title: Q2 Access and Throughput Update
attributes.content_brief: Draft leadership report on patient access, wait-time trends, urgent care intake, imaging turnaround, and specialty referral delays.

attributes.title: Monthly Operations Snapshot - June
attributes.content_brief: Brief monthly operations summary covering staffing, volumes, and service-line throughput.

attributes.title: Triage Workflow Notes
attributes.content_brief: Internal memo on revised triage workflow and front-desk coverage adjustments.

attributes.title: Wait Time Trend Table Q2
attributes.content_brief: Spreadsheet with Q2 wait-time trends across urgent care, imaging, and specialty referrals.
